content: The 2025 generation of ICM curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms can be repurposed to actively prune and prioritize low-information outdated content in an autonomous agent's working memory, directly mitigating the reasoning degradation caused by working memory capacity limits. Instead of using curiosity purely to drive exploration of new environments, ICM's novelty prediction error becomes a working memory gatekeeping signal that keeps only high-novelty, high-information state representations within the limited capacity bound.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
